home.rescanSubtitle: Missing a payment? Re-query the blockchain directly for recent transfers.
home.rescanFailed: Couldn't reach {{names}}. Fix its RPC from the home banner, or check a block explorer.
home.rescanNativeNote: Native coins (ETH, BNB, MATIC…) received on some networks can’t be detected here. Your balance is still correct — open a block explorer for the full record.
home.rescanExplorerTitle: Check directly on a block explorer
home.emptySubtitle: Incoming payments will appear here in real time.
home.invalidQrBody: Please scan a valid Ethereum address or connection URI.
home.connEmptySub: Scan a dApp QR code to connect.
home.connNote: Only one active connection at a time
home.connReconnectStuck: Couldn't reconnect. Try again, or disconnect and re-pair.
home.connNoEvents: No requests yet on this connection.
home.connClearBody: Removes all signing records for this connection from this device. On-chain transactions aren't affected.
